title: Emission reducer fuel saving apparatus
abstract: The invention relates to fuel saving apparatus that saves fuel and reduces emissions in diesel powered vehicles that run on diesel fuel. The invention particularly relates to fuel saving apparatus which is connected to diesel filter outlet, and which increases the combustion power of fuel passing through by means of magnets that are in the apparatus thus provides fuel saving and low emission.
claims:
Claims The invention is fuel saving apparatus (100) that provides fuel saving and low emission in vehicles which run on fuel oil, characterized in that; it comprises â¢ Body of Apparatus (130) which has inlet pipe (110) allowing the fuel coming from diesel filter (300) to flow into the saving apparatus (100), and has outlet pipe (120) ensuring the fuel filled in the saving apparatus (100) is sent to the combustion chamber of diesel engine (400) and which allows the fuel to be stored in the saving apparatus (100), â¢ Magnet pipe (140) which surrounds the rod (150) and the magnets (151), and thus allows the fuel to flow in and contact with magnets (151) closely and forms magnetic covering, â¢ And rod (150) which has the magnet (151) same poles of which is positioned facing each other, thus allowing the fuel to be fragmented and volume of the fuel to be increased by the emerging magnetic field, and the washer (152) that ensures that a certain distance is maintained between the magnets (151), and the nut (153) that prevents magnets (151) at the end to move out by the pushing force. The invention is saving apparatus (100) according to claim 1, characterized in that; it comprises at least one pipe groove (141) which allows the fuel flowing into the magnet pipe (140) to exit from the magnet pipe (140) after being exposed to the magnetic field formed by the magnets (151) and which is provided on the magnet pipe (140) . 

The invention is saving apparatus (100) according to claim 1, characterized in that; The rod (150) is in the grooved structure in order to keep the magnet (151), the washer (152) and the nut (153) that are provided thereon fixed .
